title: Steam Mod Manifest Schema
description: Schema for mod manifest files used with SteamUploader. Supports JSON, YAML, and TOML formats.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI that validates this manifest file

workshopid.description: Steam Workshop ID for the mod (if updating an existing item). If not provided, a new item will be created and that field will be added to the mod manifest automatically upon creation.

appid.description: Steam application ID for the game

content.description: Path to the mod content directory (relative or absolute)

preview.description: Path to the preview image file for the mod (PNG, GIF)

title.description: Title/name of the mod as it will appear on Steam Workshop

description.description: Path to description file or inline description text. The description of Steam Workshop items uses BBCode formatting.

visibility.description: Visibility level for the mod on Steam Workshop. 0=Public, 1=Friends Only, 2=Private/Hidden, 3=Unlisted

tags.description: Tags to categorize the mod. This is dependent on the Workshop of the Game you upload to. Check the game's Workshop page for available tags.
